overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a tactical stealth game showing a character crawling prone through tall grass in a tropical savanna environment. The camera briefly tilts down to reveal the player character in black tactical gear and up to show the blue sky with scattered clouds.

agents.ego_description: crawling prone through tall grass, moving steadily forward through the savanna

entered.detail: dense tall green and brown grass covering the ground
cluster of palm trees on the left horizon
scattered palm trees on the right side
patch of brown dry grass mixed with green vegetation

segments.scene_description: The camera moves at a low angle through dense tall grass in a tropical savanna environment. Palm trees are visible on both sides in the distance under a bright blue sky with scattered clouds. The vegetation sways slightly as the character crawls forward.

events.description: camera tilts down to reveal the player character in black tactical gear crouching in the grass
camera tilts upward to show the blue sky with scattered white clouds

agents.ego_description: character looks down at their own body and equipment, then looks up at the sky while remaining prone in the grass

segments.scene_description: The camera tilts down to reveal the player character dressed in black tactical gear positioned in the tall grass. After a moment, the camera tilts upward to focus on the bright blue sky with fluffy white clouds before beginning to return to the forward position.

agents.ego_description: continuing to crawl forward through the grass, heading toward a denser cluster of palm trees

entered.detail: palm trees now closer on the left side as the camera turns

segments.scene_description: The camera returns to a forward-facing position and continues moving through the tall grass, approaching a denser cluster of palm trees on the left. The environment remains consistent with the tropical savanna setting as the movement continues.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a low-angle camera movement through a tropical savanna that shifts from a forward glide to a brief character reveal before returning to its path. It begins by pushing through dense, swaying tall grass with distant palm trees framing a bright blue sky. As the movement pauses, the camera tilts down to reveal a character in black tactical gear prone in the vegetation before tilting upward to focus on the fluffy white clouds above. The scene then shifts back to a forward-facing perspective, continuing the steady advance through the grass. Finally, the camera approaches a denser cluster of palm trees on the left as it maintains its trajectory through the sunlit savanna.
